title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Dulux Decorator Centre Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Dulux Decorator Centre Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Dulux Decorator Centre Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Dulux Decorator Centre Ventures Solutions:
Dulux Decorator Centre Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dulux Decorator Centre Ventures Solutions!
